artDirection.style: Sleek sci-fi vector art with holographic glow effects
artDirection.mood: Dark cosmic void with vibrant energy signatures
artDirection.signature: Cyan holographic rim-light on every element — unifying the cold void of space with warm energy of life

player.desc: Astra exploration ship — sleek hull with cyan engine glow, dual wings with tip lights, luminous cockpit as soul point, antenna arrays, energy stripe details

enemy.desc: Alien drone — menacing red/orange hull, single glowing red eye, horn and mandible weapons, rear spikes, energy veins pulsing through armor

bgLayer1.desc: Deep space far layer — 90+ stars in 3 brightness layers, 5 nebula clouds (purple/pink/cyan/amber/blue), distant galaxies, constellation lines, meteors, asteroid belt, floating towers, distant planet with rings

bgLayer2.desc: Near space layer — asteroid clusters with glowing cracks, space station ruins, dimensional portal, ice crystal formations, derelict satellite, ruined space bridge, cargo containers, ship wreckage, energy wisps, floating debris

uiHeart.desc: HP shield icon — green gradient heart with 3D highlight, medical cross overlay, energy circuit lines, bottom glow point, rim light

uiStar.desc: Score crystal star — golden gradient 5-point star with faceted gem highlights, sparkle rays in 8 directions, energy ring, micro sparkle dots

powerup.desc: Energy powerup crystal — hexagonal frame with orbiting rings, cyan crystal core with facets, lightning bolt icon, rune symbols, orbital dots, energy pulse rings, particle trails

effectHit.desc: Explosion impact — 5-layer radial blast (outer shockwave → ring → inner glow → core flash → white center), 16 debris rays, jagged spark lines, smoke wisps, distortion rings, ember particles

thumbnail.desc: Cinematic poster — Astra ship firing lasers at boss enemy near black hole with accretion disk, nebula backdrop, asteroid field, energy shield, HUD overlay, title 'CELESTIAL DRIFT' with gradient glow
